title: SI A KHUT GUAK MASUAN DING MAW?

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Si ding a khut guak masuan in,
Hong Hon pa' mai mu ding maw?
A mahdawn na ding mi
khat zong
tonpih lo guak pai ding maw?

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Sih ding kih ta ka hi kei hi,
Topa in hong hon zo tah,
Ahih hang in guak pai ding
pen,
Ngaih sut ciang sin lung kha lah,

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Mawh na sung a mawk kum teng,
khat vei sam kik thei leng maw,
Avek pi in Topa pia in na
deih bang
mang nuam sing maw.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Hah kat un, dingun, misiang te,
Sun lai na citak in sem,
Sih na zan in hong phak ma
in,
Mi ngah nang septheih lai sem.
